name: Youvarlakia
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------------TOMATO SAUCE--------------------------------
1. Finely chop onion, salt.
2. Mince 4 garlic cloves, add freshly ground black pepper and half a teaspoon of cinnamon.
3. Mix with chopped tomatoes (skin, seed, and chop), finely chopped basil, and mint.
4. Put the ground beef in a bowl with grated onion, minced garlic, oregano, cumin, parsley, mint, and pepper. Add salt.
5. Rinse and scald the rice by pouring boiling water over it in a bowl; let soak for 5 minutes.
6. Drain, add to the beef mixture, and mix all ingredients well.
7. Form small sausage shapes.
8. Heat oil in a large skillet and fry meatballs until brown. Drain on paper towels.
9. Add remaining onion to the pan and fry over gentle heat until translucent.
10. Add minced garlic, cinnamon, and honey; stir until caramelized.
11. Add chopped tomatoes, season with salt and pepper, and simmer for about 15 minutes until sauce has reduced.
12. Add herb broth and meatballs. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
13. Sprinkle with chopped herbs before serving.
